title: astragalus depressus var. leucophaeus
intro: Astragalus depressus var. leucophaeus, also known as the white-fruited milkvetch, is a perennial plant species in the legume family. It is a type of legume used in traditional Chinese medicine, known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant has been used to enhance the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health, with health benefits ranging from reducing blood pressure to fighting off infections. Astragalus depressus var. leucophaeus can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as capsules, teas, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
